name: statuscake-mcp
description: A minimal, token-efficient MCP server for StatusCake uptime monitoring.
long_description: Exposes a small set of tools for StatusCake uptime monitoring that return terse plain-text summaries (not raw JSON) so an LLM client spends as few tokens as possible: list_sites, check_sites_down, get_site, site_history, check_ssl_expiring, pause_site, and resume_site. List tools are filtered and paged so they stay cheap on accounts with thousands of checks. Runs locally over stdio as a self-contained binary; no .NET runtime install is required.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: Roster of uptime checks (glyph, name, status), with optional filter/status/paging.

tools.name: check_sites_down
tools.description: Only the checks currently down, with a total count (or confirms all are up).

tools.name: get_site
tools.description: Detail for one check by id: status, uptime %, check rate, last tested.

tools.name: site_history
tools.description: Recent up/down periods for one check by id, most recent first, with durations.

tools.name: check_ssl_expiring
tools.description: SSL certificates expiring within N days (default 30), soonest first. Paged.

tools.name: pause_site
tools.description: Pause one check by id (id-only, no name lookup).

api_token.title: StatusCake API Token
api_token.description: API token from StatusCake (My Account → API Keys). Used as a Bearer token; tool calls return 403 until it is set.
